text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Hi! You okay, Ace? You look exhausted!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, because it's my birthday! I just did a lap
around the whole school.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
I've got these special rules I made for myself. One
is to time a run at full speed around the academy
on my birthday.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text: Another is to beat last year's time, every time!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna become even better than I was last
year! And my birthday's the perfect day to mark
that!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Whistle... Awesome! That kind of thing really suits you, Ace!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I knew coming all the way here to meet you
was the right call!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did you need something from me?

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Ace of Japan—I just wanted to
tell you that!
